scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@luckyray/astronomy && npm run test --workspace=@luckyray/jyotish
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name '.next' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +
